predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    dhs.CASTE_RELIGION_GROUP_8_CATEGORY, 
    dhs.SOCIAL_NETWORK_CONTACT_2_TYPE, 
    AVG(fhc.MONTHLY_TOTAL_CONSUMPTION_EXPENDITURE_RS) AS average_monthly_household_expenditure,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fhc.HOUSEHOLD_ID) AS total_households
FROM 
    DIM_HOUSEHOLD_SOCIAL dhs
JOIN 
    DIM_HOUSEHOLD dh ON dhs.HOUSEHOLD_ID = dh.HOUSEHOLD_ID
JOIN 
    FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CONSUMPTION fhc ON dh.HOUSEHOLD_ID = fhc.HOUSEHOLD_ID
GROUP BY 
    dhs.CASTE_RELIGION_GROUP_8_CATEGORY, 
    dhs.SOCIAL_NETWORK_CONTACT_2_TYPE
ORDER BY 
    average_monthly_household_expenditure DESC;
raw_output:

    dhs.CASTE_RELIGION_GROUP_8_CATEGORY, 
    dhs.SOCIAL_NETWORK_CONTACT_2_TYPE, 
    AVG(fhc.MONTHLY_TOTAL_CONSUMPTION_EXPENDITURE_RS) AS average_monthly_household_expenditure,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fhc.HOUSEHOLD_ID) AS total_households
FROM 
    DIM_HOUSEHOLD_SOCIAL dhs
JOIN 
    DIM_HOUSEHOLD dh ON dhs.HOUSEHOLD_ID = dh.HOUSEHOLD_ID
JOIN 
    FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CONSUMPTION fhc ON dh.HOUSEHOLD_ID = fhc.HOUSEHOLD_ID
GROUP BY 
    dhs.CASTE_RELIGION_GROUP_8_CATEGORY, 
    dhs.SOCIAL_NETWORK_CONTACT_2_TYPE
ORDER BY 
    average_monthly_household_expenditure DESC;

question: महाराष्ट्रातील ग्रामीण कुटुंबांचे एकूण मासिक अन्नेतर खर्चानुसार उतरत्या क्रमाने रँक करा, सर्वाधिक खर्च करणाऱ्यांपासून सुरुवात करा.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, SUM(T2.MONTHLY_NON_FOOD_EXPENDITURE_RS) FROM DIM_HOUSEHOLD AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CONSUMPTION AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T3 ON T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T3.STATE = 'Maharashtra' AND T3.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID ORDER BY SUM(T2.MONTHLY_NON_FOOD_EXPENDITURE_RS) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT fc.CONSUMPTION_RICE_EXPENDITURE_RS + fc.CONSUMPTION_WHEAT_EXPENDITURE_RS + fc.CONSUMPTION_SUGAR_EXPENDITURE_RS + fc.CONSUMPTION_PULSES_EXPENDITURE_RS + fc.CONSUMPTION_MILK_EXPENDITURE_RS + fc.CONSUMPTION_VEGETABLES_EXPENDITURE_RS + fc.CONSUMPTION_EDIBLE_OILS_EXPENDITURE_RS AS total_food_expenditure, dh.HOUSEHOLD_ID
FROM FACT_FOOD_CONSUMPTION fc

JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY dgh ON fhc.GEOGRAPHY_ID = dgh.GEOGRAPHY_ID

ORDER BY total_food_expenditure DESC;
